result.experience_gap: Build 1–2 projects covering the missing skills before applying.
resume_improvements: Add specific metrics to every bullet (%, users, time saved, requests/sec)
Mirror exact keywords from the job description in your bullets
Write a tailored 3–4 sentence professional summary at the top
Describe each project's real-world impact, not just the tech used
List specific versions/tools: FastAPI 0.100, LangChain 0.2, Python 3.11

resume_bullet_rewrites.original: Built AI-powered PDF chat system using LLMs and FAISS
resume_bullet_rewrites.improved: Architected AI-powered PDF chat system using LangChain + FAISS vector search, enabling sub-2s semantic Q&A over 100+ page documents

resume_bullet_rewrites.original: Designed FastAPI backend for real-world usage
resume_bullet_rewrites.improved: Designed async FastAPI backend handling concurrent LLM inference requests, supporting multiple simultaneous user sessions

result.final_verdict: 🟠 Partial Match — Build projects for missing skills.

project_recommendations.description: Create a Retrieval-Augmented Generation system: upload documents, ask questions, get LLM-grounded answers with source citations.
Build a scalable REST API with user auth, role-based access control, database integration, and Docker containerisation.
Train a model, serve it via FastAPI, containerise with Docker, and deploy to AWS EC2 with CI/CD.
